hero.unifiedIntro: Frontend developer with a solid background in Design and UX. I create elegant and functional interfaces using React, TypeScript, and software engineering best practices. Based in Rio de Janeiro.

aboutHero.intro: Frontend developer with a solid background in Design. I create digital products that combine code precision with aesthetic sensibility, delivering exceptional experiences from concept to production.

about.title: About Me
about.text1: Creative Frontend Developer with over 5 years of experience in Design, now focused on software engineering. Specialized in React, TypeScript, and modern frontend architectures.
about.text2: My journey combines creative vision with technical thinking, allowing me to develop interfaces that not only visually delight but are also performant, accessible, and scalable.
about.text3: Experience building complete products: from Design Systems and Figma prototyping to implementation with React, Supabase integration, and production deployment. Focus on clean code, componentization, and best practices.
about.quote: I believe exceptional code goes beyond functionality—it must be elegant, maintainable, and create experiences that delight users.

footer.description: Creative Frontend Developer & UI/UX Designer. Building scalable digital products with the precision of code and the soul of design.

items.quote: Paula completely transformed our digital strategy. Her knowledge in automation and No-Code allowed us to scale much faster than we imagined.
items.author: John Silva

items.quote: Working with Paula was an exceptional experience. She not only delivered measurable results in media performance, but also brought a strategic vision that changed our business.
items.author: Mary Santos

items.quote: Paula's ability to connect strategy with technical execution is impressive. She developed solutions that saved significant time and resources.
items.author: Carlos Oliveira

website.challenge: The client needed a professional digital presence that reflected their expertise in family consulting, with an integrated scheduling system and automated lead capture. The challenge was to create a complete solution without compromising performance or user experience.
website.solution: I developed a complete platform using No-Code tools, integrating responsive design, SEO-optimized blog, scheduling system and lead automation. The focus was on creating a scalable architecture with excellent performance.

portfolio.challenge: Create a portfolio that went beyond a simple gallery. The goal was to build a platform that not only showcased my projects but demonstrated my skills in design (UI/UX), advanced web animations, No-Code architecture, and strategic storytelling.
portfolio.solution: I developed this site from scratch, treating it as a product. The design (V3) focuses on monochromatic sophistication, the performance (V11) is optimized with lightweight animations (no 'lag'), and the structure (V12) is a narrative funnel that proves my qualifications in a lean and direct way.
results: Proof of Concept (PoC) of No-Code skills

microsaas.challenge: Digital marketing agencies spend countless hours compiling data from multiple sources (Google Ads, Meta Ads, Analytics) into manual reports. A slow, expensive process prone to human error that delays decision-making.
microsaas.solution: A MicroSaaS (under construction) that automates 100% of data collection and visualization. The platform will use AI to analyze metrics and generate actionable insights (not just raw data), delivering high-performance reports in seconds, not hours.

dashboard.challenge: Healthcare content creators (doctors, nutritionists) produce high-value materials but struggle to measure the real impact and ROI of their publications across different channels. Metrics are scattered and difficult to correlate.
dashboard.solution: A centralized analytical dashboard (under construction). The tool unifies engagement metrics, audience growth, and lead conversion (e.g., appointments), providing a clear view of which content is generating the greatest business impact.
results: Strategy optimization based on real data

platform.challenge: Professional makeup artists manage their businesses in a fragmented way: using Instagram for portfolio, WhatsApp for scheduling, and spreadsheets (or notebooks) for client management. This leads to time loss, lack of professionalism, and revenue loss.
platform.solution: An 'all-in-one' MicroSaaS (under construction) focused on beauty professionals. The platform integrates a visual portfolio (UI/UX) with a smart scheduling system, client management (CRM), and basic financial control, centralizing the entire business operation.
